title: Leipzig, Germany, Car Ramming Attack Kills 2
summary_full: Officials in Leipzig, where the attack occurred, said the driver was a 33-year-old German-born citizen. They have not yet determined his motive.
summary_public: Officials in Leipzig, where the attack occurred, said the driver was a 33-year-old German-born citizen. They have not yet determined his motive.
